01_curriculum.description: Primary study guide — 48 sessions, ITE questions injected, dividers fixed. Source of truth for v5-pearls.
v5 + 21 green Key Pearls callout blocks injected (one per session-linked AFP article).
v6 with supplement callout spacing fix (1,139 paragraphs, 60pt before/after). Resident-facing version.
Standalone 240-question supplement doc. 48 sessions x 5 questions, navy/blue palette, answer key glossary.

Reference library doc — 49 ITE-cited refs across 31 sessions, full structured clinical content per ref. Crosswalk powered by session_hy_inserts_v7 (352 citations), 5 batch dirs, 243 JSONs. Regenerated 2026-03-08.

Gold Tier Reference Sheet — all 21 pre_calibration_archive docs, fully extracted content, zero placeholders. Standalone: gen_gold_tier_v2.js reads archive directly, no crosswalk dependency. Built 2026-03-08 (81KB).

05_acquisition.description: 456 not-found refs ranked by tier. Rebuilt session_M against 265-PDF library.
05_acquisition.status: CURRENT — re-run after next acquisition folder added
